name: single_key_default_sighash
provenance: Generated from deterministic libbitcoinpqc seed 0x20 plus an independent Python P2MR serializer; the vector signs the manually computed P2MRSighash digest with libbitcoinpqc and does not use qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.

name: single_key_default_sighash_annex_present
provenance: Generated from deterministic libbitcoinpqc seed 0x21 plus an independent Python P2MR serializer; the vector signs the manually computed annex-present P2MRSighash digest with libbitcoinpqc and does not use qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.
